modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble deleting rows and columns in Excel worksheet.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to clean up my Excel worksheet by deleting some rows and columns, but I couldn't figure out how to do it. It seems like a simple task, but every time I tried, nothing happened. I'm not sure if I'm missing something or if there's a trick to it.
short_description: Trouble deleting rows and columns in Excel worksheet.
description: I was trying to clean up my Excel worksheet by deleting some rows and columns, but I couldn't figure out how to do it. It seems like a simple task, but every time I tried, nothing happened. I'm not sure if I'm missing something or if there's a trick to it.
